entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`date` TEXT NOT NULL, `display_count` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at_ms` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`date`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`record_date` TEXT NOT NULL, `sequence` INTEGER NOT NULL, `word_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`record_date`, `sequence`), FOREIGN KEY(`record_date`) REFERENCES `floating_word_display_record`(`date`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_floating_word_display_word_record_date
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_floating_word_display_word_record_date` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`record_date`)

indices.name: index_floating_word_display_word_word_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_floating_word_display_word_word_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`word_id`)

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
